name: Tronox Holdings plc
business: Tronox is the world's leading vertically integrated manufacturer of titanium dioxide (TiO2) pigment. It operates titanium-bearing mineral sand mines and beneficiation operations in Australia and South Africa, and produces feedstock for its seven pigment facilities. The company also sells co-products including zircon, pig iron, and monazite.

exposures.sentence: Tronox is the world s leading vertically integrated manufacturer of TiO 2 pigment.

The mining, beneficiation and smelting of titanium bearing mineral sands also creates meaningful quantities of co-products including zircon, pig iron and the rare-earth bearing mineral, monazite, which we also supply to customers around the world.

we are now seeking to maximize the value of our existing geologic resources and deploy our substantial technical know how and human capital to become a significant supplier of REO to non-Chinese producers of metals and permanent magnets.

These REOs can then be metallized and formed into permanent magnets, particularly NdFeB magnets, that are needed to manufacture electric vehicle motors, wind turbines and other green economy applications.

These REOs can then be metallized and formed into permanent magnets, particularly NdFeB magnets, that are needed to manufacture electric vehicle motors, wind turbines and other green economy applications.

Like most major corporations, during the normal course of business, we have been the target of cyberattacks, including phishing or ransomware attacks, from time to time, and we expect to be the target of such cyberattacks in the future.

catalysts.event: Achieve $125-$175 million in annualized savings from Sustainable Cost Improvement Program
catalysts.sentence: This initiative delivered over $90 million in annualized savings by year-end 2025 and is projected to achieve approximately $125-$175 million in annualized savings (including the $90 million realized in 2025) by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Further development of rare earth cracking and leaching facility
catalysts.sentence: Further development of this facility is expected to be conducted in 2026.

catalysts.event: Second large-scale renewable energy project in South Africa fully operational
catalysts.sentence: in June 2024, we announced a second large-scale renewable energy project in South Africa that is expected to be fully operational by the end of 2027.

catalysts.event: Achieve 50% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emission intensity by 2030
catalysts.sentence: we are continuing to actively progress GHG reduction plans to enable us to achieve our target of a 50% reduction by the end of 2030 also against a 2019 baseline.

catalysts.event: EU anti-dumping duties on Chinese TiO2 expire
catalysts.sentence: The anti-dumping duties imposed by the European Commission in January 2025 will remain in effect for an initial period of five years until January 2030 with the possibility of an extension for an additional five years.

catalysts.event: Permanent closure of Fuzhou TiO2 plant announced
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Company announced its intent to permanently close its TiO 2 plant in Fuzhou, China which will impact approximately 550 employees in that region.
